channel.title: Tech Notes on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Tech Notes on yexca'Blog

item.title: i18n Implementation in Decoupled Architectures
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-3-flash-preview There are many ways to implement internationalization (i18n) today. The technology is mature, so it’s all about choosing the right approach for your specific needs. Data Types Data generally falls into two categories, each requiring a different handling strategy. Static Data Static data includes things like countries, languages, currencies, and timezones. These rarely change and usually follow international standards. …
